allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cmd=d.get\(''''tool_input'''',{}\).get\(''''command'''',''''''''\); exit\(0 if ''''trivy'''' in cmd else 1\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);if\(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command&&j.tool_input.command.includes\(''''trivy''''\)\){console.log\(JSON.stringify\({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:''''PreToolUse'''',additionalContext:''''TRIVY COMMAND DETECTED: Follow the trivy-scanning skill rules from .claude/skills/rules/trivy-scanning.md. Use best practices: filter by severity \(--severity HIGH,CRITICAL\), use appropriate output format, and apply project-specific scanning patterns.''''}}\)\)}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''d:/dev/projects/job-hunt/.claude/settings.json'',''utf8''\);const j=JSON.parse\(s\);const hook=j.hooks.PreToolUse[0];console.log\(''matcher:'', hook.matcher\);console.log\(''type:'', hook.hooks[0].type\);console.log\(''command starts with:'', hook.hooks[0].command.substring\(0,30\)\);console.log\(''JSON valid: true''\);")
